title: discover/consolidate: _project_name_from_key dash-splits path -> wrong project buckets
description: providers/claude.py:48 splits the flattened dir key on '-' and returns the last token, so ai-coder-rules->'rules', agents-in-a-box->'box', sporthead-sim->'sim'. Breaks consolidate scoping + per-project/branch shard keys. Fix: strip path prefix up to git-root marker (-d-git-) / clone prefix, split worktree sub-shards on '--', or git rev-parse --show-toplevel basename. GH #18.

title: reflect CLI: cannot remove/correct a learning (content-hash ids duplicate on edit, no remove verb, superseded_by ignored)
description: reflect add derives doc id from content hash, so editing a doc creates a duplicate instead of overwriting; no 'reflect remove' verb; superseded_by is metadata-only and ignored by retrieval, so wrong learnings keep getting injected until a full 'reflect reindex --force' (rebuilt ~3834 docs to purge one). Requests: reflect remove <id>; honor/apply superseded_by in ranking; stable slug ids so --force overwrites. GH #19.
